summary: Implements SyncStateRepository with get/upsert over sync_state, storing a string checkpoint per channel

guarantees: Get returns (nil, nil) when no row exists for channelID
Upsert is idempotent: inserts on first call, updates checkpoint and last_sync_at on subsequent calls for the same channelID

effects: SQLite reads and writes on sync_state table

observations.text: Checkpoint is TEXT (migration 002 converted from INTEGER last_msg_id). This allows sources to use arbitrary checkpoint formats — Telegram message IDs, ETags, ISO timestamps, etc. The storage layer has no opinion on the format.
Used by the refresh pipeline to determine resume position per channel. The checkpoint string semantics are owned by the source adapters, not this repository.
